privileged_info_summary: I have verified that the task uses real release data fetched from the official Rocket.Chat GitHub API snapshot. The target channel 'release-updates' is created via setup scripts. The search keyword '7.8.5' accurately corresponds to a real release present in the seeded data. The required reply text 'Confirmed: 7.8.5 backport patches verified in staging environment.' explicitly matches both the task instructions and the cleanup logic in setup_task.sh.
